description_long: This is a large, modern residential house set within a landscaped lot featuring manicured hedges, trees, and open green spaces. The structure is primarily composed of clean, white geometric volumes with flat roofs, large glass windows, and several outdoor living areas, including a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool. The property is enclosed by low hedges and fencing, with paved walkways and driveways leading to multiple entrances and garage-like structures. The house includes several distinct wings and outdoor patios, with greenery integrated into the design for both privacy and aesthetics. The overall layout is open and expansive, with a strong emphasis on symmetry and contemporary architectural elements. The use of black and white contrasts, along with natural wood and stone accents, gives the house a sleek, upscale appearance.
description: A large, modern house with flat roofs, expansive glass windows, landscaped gardens, and a backyard pool, enclosed by hedges and fencing. The design features clean lines, open patios, and a mix of white, black, and natural materials.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance with a formal pathway, symmetrical landscaping, and prominent white facade with vertical greenery.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the driveway, garage area, and additional green spaces, with more of the house's depth and outdoor patios visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the large swimming pool, backyard patio, and extensive glass windows opening to the outdoor living area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the secondary entrance, more private garden areas, and the integration of trees and hedges along the perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, formal path, flanked by hedges and columns, with a minimalist door and no overhang.
